name: firebase-mcp
description: Repo-local plugin that exposes the official Firebase MCP server through firebase-tools.

interface.shortDescription: Official Firebase MCP server for project operations.
interface.longDescription: Adds the official Firebase MCP server from firebase-tools so future Codex sessions can inspect and operate on Firebase resources for this project.
defaultPrompt: List Firebase projects available to this machine.
Inspect Firestore collections for the active project.
Help set up Firebase Auth and Firestore safely.
